name: webcam-snap-marketplace
description: Marketplace hosting the webcam-snap plugin: let Claude take and analyze photos from a local V4L2 webcam via ffmpeg.

plugins.name: webcam-snap
plugins.description: Take a photo from the local webcam (/dev/video0) with ffmpeg, then let Claude view and analyze it. Triggers on 'take a photo', 'selfie', '拍照', '看看现在的环境'.
